appStore.title: App Store
appStore.subtitle: Manage the enterprise app marketplace, install or uninstall apps
appStore.confirmUninstallContent: Uninstalling will remove related configuration and data, and users will no longer be able to use this app. Continue?
appStore.emptySubDesc: The app store is empty. Install your first enterprise app using the button below.
appStore.uploadSuccessAfter: " uploaded successfully. Complete configuration to enable the service.

myApp.title: Explore enterprise AI apps
myApp.subtitle: Find apps with professional capabilities to solve complex business problems
myApp.emptySubDesc: You do not have access to any apps. Your administrator may not have granted permissions yet, or apps may not be deployed.

upload.cannotCancelAfterDone: Installation is complete and cannot be cancelled
upload.confirmCancelContent: Upload is in progress. Cancelling will interrupt the upload. Continue?
upload.dragHint: Click or drag a file here to upload
upload.installSuccessDesc: Your app was installed successfully. You can view it in the app list.

config.agentAlertTitle: The following agents are included in this app. Use the link below to view or adjust detailed configuration (e.g. knowledge sources, model parameters).
config.ontologyAlertTitle: This app depends on the following business knowledge networks. Complete data view mapping in ADP so the app can access data.
